intro: I'm a Master's student in Business Analytics at Purdue with about a year and a half of industry experience. I've built dashboards that ran on the executive floor, models that recovered margin nobody knew was leaking, and most recently, multi-agent AI systems that automate the kind of reasoning a finance committee usually does in a room.
paragraphs: I'm a Master's student in Business Analytics at Purdue with about a year and a half of industry experience building data-driven decision systems. From Power BI dashboards that drove operational visibility, to multi-agent AI systems that automate corporate finance decisions.

My favorite problems are the ones where the data is messy, the stakeholders disagree, and the answer needs to be defensible in a room full of executives. I work at the intersection of analytics, machine learning, and business strategy.

stats.label: Reporting time saved at last role
